---
title: Title of the report

subtitle: Subtitle

author:
  - name: Julien Vitay 
    email: julien.vitay@eodyn.com
    url: https://julien-vitay.net
    affiliation: eOdyn
    affiliation-url: https://eodyn.com
    orcid: 0000-0001-5229-2349

  - name: Yann Guichoux 
    email: yann.guichoux@eodyn.com
    url: https://eodyn.com
    affiliation: eOdyn
    affiliation-url: https://eodyn.com
    orcid: 0000-0001-5683-335X

  - name: Gwenaële Jan 
    email: gwenaele.jan@eodyn.com
    url: https://eodyn.com
    affiliation: eOdyn
    affiliation-url: https://eodyn.com

date: today

abstract: | 
  This is the abstract of the report.
  It can span multiple lines.
---

## Introduction

### First subsection

![eOdyn [@Vitay2017]](img/logo.png){#fig-matrix width=50%}

### Second subsection


## Material and methods

## Results {#sec-results}

## Discussion

## References
